expectations.text: Semantic HTML structure with header, nav, main, footer elements
expectations.evidence: Lines present in output demonstrate semantic structure: header, nav, main, footer elements with proper roles and aria attributes

expectations.text: Inline CSS properly integrated using style.inlineCss(css""" """) syntax
expectations.evidence: Lines 20-200+ (approx): style.inlineCss(css""" ... """) properly wraps CSS content with proper string interpolation

expectations.text: Inline JavaScript properly integrated using script.inlineJs(js""" """) syntax
expectations.evidence: Output contains script.inlineJs pattern but verification of proper js""" string interpolation syntax not clearly confirmed in the examined portion

expectations.text: Data attributes applied using data("key") := "value" pattern
expectations.evidence: Multiple data() function calls visible in component patterns, demonstrating proper data attribute syntax

expectations.text: Multiple CSS classes applied via className tuple syntax
expectations.evidence: Multiple instances of className := ("class1", "class2", ...) syntax throughout the code

expectations.text: Form elements with proper accessibility attributes (htmlFor, id, role)
expectations.evidence: Form structure includes proper linking between labels and inputs via htmlFor and id attributes

expectations.text: Interactive JavaScript demonstrates event handling and DOM manipulation
expectations.evidence: Script content shows addEventListener patterns for click, form submission, and DOM manipulation

expectations.text: Complete page composition with multiple sections and proper element nesting
expectations.evidence: Page structure demonstrates proper nesting hierarchy from html > head/body > semantic sections > components
